summary: Single Team subscriber live game subscribed team in market - Final Game State w/ Saving Pitcher
description:
GIVEN the user is a single team subscriber
AND the in-market game for the subscribed-to-team has a game state of Final
AND the game has ended less than 90 minutes ago
AND the feed level mediaState for feeds equals MEDIA_ARCHIVE
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MASTepg
AND the game has a saving pitcher
AND the game is not a partner game

**NOTE:** wiremock favorite team 121 Mets, gamePk - 1100003005

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is not displayed
AND a lock icon is not displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header don't have a dark overlay
